name: hivemind
description: A local-first SRE assistant that uses GitHub Copilot Chat to answer questions about your infrastructure, pipelines, secrets, and services.

chatParticipants.name: hivemind
chatParticipants.description: Ask questions about your infrastructure, pipelines, secrets, and services.

commands.name: ingest
commands.description: Re-index all repos for the active client

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show HiveMind status (active client, indexed repos, branch info)

commands.name: impact
commands.description: Run impact analysis on a file or entity

commands.name: secrets
commands.description: Trace secret lifecycle for a given secret name

commands.name: branches
commands.description: List all indexed branches with tier classification

chatParticipants.name: hivemind-team-lead
chatParticipants.description: Entry point for SRE questions. Routes to specialist agents and synthesizes findings.

chatParticipants.name: hivemind-devops
chatParticipants.description: CI/CD pipelines, Harness, Helm charts, deployments, rollouts, and release automation.

chatParticipants.name: hivemind-architect
chatParticipants.description: Terraform, IaC, infrastructure layers, resource dependencies, and naming conventions.

chatParticipants.name: hivemind-security
chatParticipants.description: RBAC, managed identities, Key Vault, secrets lifecycle, and permissions.

chatParticipants.name: hivemind-investigator
chatParticipants.description: Root cause analysis and cross-domain incident tracing.

chatParticipants.name: hivemind-analyst
chatParticipants.description: Impact analysis, blast radius assessment, and change risk evaluation.

chatParticipants.name: hivemind-planner
chatParticipants.description: Runbooks, migration plans, and step-by-step operational procedures.
